title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A YouTube video arguing that AGI predictions are overstated due to fundamental mathematical limitations in transformer architectures and chain-of-thought reasoning. The video references the Time Hierarchy Theorem and autonomous agent error accumulation as evidence that current AI approaches have scaling ceilings.
